DataRequest.Name: Large Inbound Transfer From Outside My Country / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects a large inbound transfer (larger than 50MB in 10 minutes) from an external destination that is outside my country. The rule is written for United States and may need to be tuned for other countries.
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Large inbound transfer from outside my country $srcIpAddr to $destIpAddr

SubPattern.name: LargeXfer
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: srcIpAddr NOT IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET) AND destIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET) AND reptDevIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_DEVICE_FIREWALL) AND eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND srcGeoCountry NOT IN (Group@PH_COUNTRY_GROUP_MYHOME)
